samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespaces.
Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace legacy JUnit 3/4 with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) for modern testing support.
Remove JUnit Vintage engine to enforce pure JUnit 5 usage and avoid legacy test runner conflicts.
Configure Maven compiler to target Java 21 bytecode using the release flag.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
Update Groovy Eclipse compiler dependencies to versions compatible with newer Java/Maven versions.
Replace deprecated FindBugs annotations with SpotBugs annotations for modern static analysis.
Upgrade JKube Kubernetes and OpenShift plugins to versions supporting newer Java and Kubernetes APIs.
Upgrade Jib Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and modern container standards.
Refactor groupId and artifactId to align with new organizational structure.
Change parent POM to internal project parent instead of Spring Boot starter parent.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.general_idea: Ensure package lists are updated before installing dependencies in the build stage.
Reduce build noise by suppressing Maven console output.
Switch from AdoptOpenJDK to a generic Alpine-based image to support newer JDK versions.
Upgrade Alpine package tools and available packages for security and compatibility.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN apk add --upgrade apk-tools && apk upgrade --available

samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.general_idea: Make the non-root user account name configurable via a build argument.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Simplify and correct the prerequisite list to focus on GCP account access rather than specific Kubernetes cluster permissions.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Logged into a terminal window that will allow you to do deployments to a valid K8 cluster' with 'You have logged into a (Unix) terminal window that will allow you to do deployments to a valid GCP account'

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Introduce a new section for fully automated deployment using the 'Run on Google Cloud' button.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Added 'Fully Automated Build/Deploy' section with an image link to deploy.cloud.run

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Clarify build instructions by separating local machine builds from other methods.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Renamed 'Build Instructions' to 'Build Instructions on Local Machine' and added a new 'Build Instructions using Docker' section

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Provide explicit instructions for building the application image using Docker directly.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Added command: docker build . [-t gcr.io/$(gcloud config get-value project)/web8k-example:1.0]

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Update the local testing command to use the dynamically generated project ID and specific image tag.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Changed docker run command to use gcr.io/$(gcloud config get-value project)/web8k-example:1.0

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Explicitly list the supported RESTful API endpoints and their methods in the documentation.
Update the Cloud Run deployment command to explicitly specify the managed platform.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Added --platform managed flag to gcloud run deploy command

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Update cleanup instructions to include platform specification and service listing for accurate deletion.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Added --platform managed to delete command and added gcloud run services list step

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Update the reference links to point to relevant Cloud Run and Docker guides instead of Kubernetes-specific ones.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Replaced Kubernetes/Jkube links with Cloud Run and Spring Boot Docker guide links
